name: Twin Ponds Golf & Country Club
address: 169 Main St, New York Mills, NY 13417
about: Twin Ponds Golf & Country Club is a championship public golf course in New York Mills, New York, offering private country club conditions without the membership cost. The venue features an 18-hole public course, indoor golf simulators with over 100 courses, and facilities for weddings, banquets, and corporate events. The club includes a pro shop, a bar and grill, and a full-service event kitchen, making it a comprehensive destination for golf and social gatherings. The facility caters to golfers of all skill levels with a mix of challenging and accessible holes on its medium-difficulty course.
why_golfers_like_it: Private country club conditions on a public golf course
Over 100 courses available for indoor play
Mix of easy and difficult par 3 holes for varied challenge
Full-service bar and grill for post-game relaxation
Home to Gary's Golf Shop for equipment needs

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with menus for weddings, banquets, brunch, and take-out
Full bar available at Tap In Bar & Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Bringing your own clubs is recommended, but the venue has Gary's Golf Shop available for rentals or purchases.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified, but the venue has full kitchen and bar services available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but it's a championship course that can accommodate various paces of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering a welcoming atmosphere for families and hosting events suitable for all ages.
